dsl_rule.translation_notes: Converted fixed percentage offset (2.5%) into direct SMA comparison. Entry conditions check price crosses above/below the SMA with confirmation that prior bar was on opposite side. The 2.5% band offset is approximated as a stop_loss_pct since the exact volatility-adjusted band calculation is not available in the indicator set. Band type specified as fixed_percentage with ma_period=20 maps to sma_20.

backtest_rule.reason: Converted fixed percentage offset (2.5%) into direct SMA comparison. Entry conditions check price crosses above/below the SMA with confirmation that prior bar was on opposite side. The 2.5% band offset is approximated as a stop_loss_pct since the exact volatility-adjusted band calculation is not available in the indicator set. Band type specified as fixed_percentage with ma_period=20 maps to sma_20.

source_rule_text: Generate buy signals when price breaches an upper threshold band surrounding a moving average, and generate sell signals when price breaches a lower threshold band, using either fixed percentage offsets or volatility-adjusted bands.
